prompt: Dark immersive gaming room. A glossy aluminium metal wall art panel approximately 30x40cm with a vibrant sky blue football club design is mounted on a dark charcoal wall, centered above a gaming desk setup. Dual 27-inch monitors with RGB purple and blue backlighting, mechanical keyboard with glowing keys, LED strip lighting behind monitors. The glossy metal panel catches and reflects the RGB light beautifully. The panel appears to float slightly off the wall with a subtle shadow gap. Moody immersive gaming atmosphere. Interior design photography. 4K.
